rulings.Case Title: TIEA DUBLIN VS. EDUARDO NAGUIT et al

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH LEE et al VS. NARANJIBHAI R PATEL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or In The Alternative For Evidentiary Sanctions;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 20, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT NARANJIBHAI PATEL's Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or In The Alternative For Evidentiary Sanctions. Grant terminating sanctions. Deny monetary sanctions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTIAN CHURCH HOMES OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA VS. YOLANDA GALE DAVIS et al

rulings.Case Title: GREGORIO IZETA et al VS. MARIA BARRIENTOS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 20, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT MARIA CAMACHO (SUED AS MARIA BARRIENTOS) and CRESCENCIO BARRIENTOS' (SUED AS CRESCENCIO BLANCO) DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain, subject to opposition. In the future moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and C. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES VS. IVAN MARIANO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 20, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT IVAN MARIANO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to conform complaint to Notice, i.e., complaint says monthly is $3540.99, Notice says it's $1242.16. = (501/REQ)
